meta.title: Israel, Iran, and the Future of the Iranian Nuclear Deal: A Conversation with Ron Dermer
meta.description: On May 10th, Hudson Institute hosted Israel's ambassador to the U.S., Ron Dermer, for a discussion on the future of the Iran Deal after President Trump's withdrawal announcement. The discussion was hosted by Hudson senior fellow Michael Doran.
